deleteAccountWarning: This action cannot be undone. All your progress and data will be permanently deleted.
endSession: End your current session without changing any learner data.
masteryTrackingInfo: Tracking {{count}} topic(s) with spaced-repetition review data.
masteryWillAppear: Mastery data will appear here after you complete more practice sessions.
noMasteryDescription: Complete a few more practice sessions and your topic strengths will show up here.

profileDetailsDescription: Update the account information that appears across the learner experience.
topTopicsDescription: Your strongest mastery areas based on the latest learner data.
